name: Deploy App

on:
  push:
    branches:
      - master

jobs:
  deploy:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest

    steps:
      - name: Checkout Code
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Configurar Node.js
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: 18

      - name: Instalar dependencias
        run: npm install

      - name: Build App
        run: npm run build

      - name: Ejecutar aplicación
        run: node app.js
